description: A scan of page 2 of 12 of the same federal criminal indictment, black text on white with no graphic styling, seal, or added slogan. Header reads 'Case 4:25-cr-00259-P Document 79 Filed 10/15/25 Page 2 of 12 PageID 56.' The text continues: 'Seconds later, Coconspirator-1 opened fire on the officers, striking the Alvarado police officer in the neck area as the unarmed correctional officers ducked and ran for cover...' and notes most of the cell, including Zachary Evetts, were arrested shortly after, with Cameron Arnold arrested the following day. A bolded section headed 'The Antifa Cell' defines Antifa as 'a militant enterprise made up of networks of individuals and small groups primarily ascribing to a revolutionary anarchist or autonomous Marxist ideology, which explicitly calls for the overthrow of the United States Government,' and states that beginning in 2025 adherents increasingly targeted DHS/ICE agents and facilities.
notable_text: The Antifa Cell; Antifa is a militant enterprise... revolutionary anarchist or autonomous Marxist ideology... calls for the overthrow of the United States Government; Coconspirator-1 opened fire on the officers
